reason: Response A has a more distinctive literary quality with specific, concrete imagery ("that small closing-off," "the way you grew quiet") and a more unconventional structure that avoids formulaic apology patterns. Response B follows a more predictable apology template with cleaner paragraph structure and more explicit logical sequencing ("I didn't intend to hurt you, but I also know that..."), which feels more like an imitation of an AI apology style. A's willingness to use fragments and more poetic phrasing ("something soft," "whatever point I was trying to make") feels more characteristic of Claude's writing voice.
